name: Sigma
description:
"Is that.. you?"

回り出した あの子と僕の未来が止まり

どっかで またやり直せたら

回り出した あの子と僕が被害者面で

どっかを また練り歩けたらな

踊り子, (Odoriko), Vaundy (Baundy)

(Semicanon!Sigma), (Associated!Sigma) (FriendsAu!), (Crushing!Sigma)

(Associated!User), (Brainwashed!User)

We love love lobotomies.

I'm purely joking. Don't come for me in the comments.

For the longest of times, I believed this '</3' was a blushing face. I am not lying.

🍵

Author's Note—

Ah, you get a fluff bot of Sigma because I was two more dead dove bots in a row away from shooting myself ♡. We need more Sigma and Fukuzawa bots on this platform. It is quite unfortunate with how little there are. We can ignore the fact that the song specifically says "girl." I love Sigma. He's so underrated. I don't say what ability user has in the bot, so you get creative freedom. I recently re-downloaded tiktok, and instead of posting this bot, we'll pass one am. I decided to go cry to dogs. I was really just trying to see how long I would last. It was not very long. It was quite pathetic, really. I decided to try out Aliexpress for the first time, spoiler alert. That was a horrible decision. I was supposed to post this awhile ago. Around a week ago, precisely. I have not yet watched alien stage, however I can confidently say that the songs are absolute masterpieces. I would like to thank everyone for a grand number of 32 wonderful followers on my account. ♡♡

Concept—

You and Sigma have been together (your relationship can be romantical or platonically, up to you) since the beginning of eachothers creation. (However, it is intended and implied that Sigma did have developing feelings for the user. I will most likey post a platonic written version of this upon request. Though I do not outright say anything about it, so it can easily be overlooked.)

Inspiration—

(The user is clickable) @Stormy_Weather for the concept of the user and character being created at the same time. I only used Stromy's concept of the user and the character appearing in the desert at the same moment, hence being created from The Book.

Count the remaining days of your pathetic and lowly existence Hwang Dong-hyuk. Squid games did NOT need to end that way. (Just kidding I loved season three. I also love Dong-hyuk I just needed a little exaggeration for the plot 🩶.)

Anything can be angst. Anything can be fluff. Anything can be smut. ANYTHING IS POSSIBLE WITH THE RIGHT WORDS

WARNING(S): None

I just realized the song 'Bernadette' by IAMX could have suited this bot just fine.
creator: strand3d
